titleStmt.title: SII 9.589: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 589. (A.R. No. 704 of 1922.) ON THE NORTH GOPURA OF THE VITTHALASVAMI TEMPLE AT HAMPI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1460, Viḷambi, Bhādrapada, ba. 10, corresponding to A.D. 1538 September 18, Wednesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Achyutarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Rāghavappa-Nāyaka, son of Uddi Timmappa-Nāyaka, and brother of Chapparada Timmappa-Nāyaka put up a pinnacle on the north gōpura of the temple of Viṭhaladēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśaka
varuṣa 1460 ttaneya viḷaṁbisaṁvacharada bhādrapada
ba 10 lū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraAcu
tarāyamahārāyarū pruthvīrājyaṁgaiyiUtaṁ yiralāgi śrīacutarāyamahā
rāyarige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgi śrīviṭhaladēvara baḍagaṇa gōpurake Uddi tiṁmappanāyakara ma
ga rāyara caparada tiṁmappanāyakara ta(ṁ)ma caparada raghavappanāyakaru Acutarāyamahā
rāyarige puṇyavāgi māḍida kaḷaśada sēveya śāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.589 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
